summary: Completed testing of KKTCX iteration 10 features. All admin menu restructuring and new pages (Appointments, Reports) are working correctly. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All requested features verified working.
seed_data_creation: 3 appointments exist in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified working. Admin menu has 6 sections (Genel, Kullanıcılar, İlanlar, İçerik, Katalog, Ayarlar). New AdminAppointments and AdminReports pages are fully functional.

admin_menu_structure.icerik_section: PASS - Contains Sayfa İçerikleri, Medya Yönetimi, Çeviriler
admin_menu_structure.ayarlar_section: PASS - Contains Site Ayarları, SEO Yönetimi, SMS Ayarları, Entegrasyonlar

admin_appointments_page.appointments_table: PASS - Shows Date/Time, Partner, User, Duration, Price, Status, Actions
admin_appointments_page.appointment_rows: PASS - 3 appointments displayed with proper data

admin_reports_page.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Toplam Gelir, Sayfa Görüntüleme, Yeni Kullanıcılar, Randevular
admin_reports_page.charts: PASS - Shows Görüntüleme Trendi, Gelir Trendi
